name: Stock Entry Ledger for Subcontractors
query:
SELECT
    se.name AS "Stock Entry No",
    se.stock_entry_type AS "Stock Entry Type",
    se.posting_date AS "Posting Date",
    sed.s_warehouse AS "Source Warehouse",
    sed.t_warehouse AS "Target Warehouse",
    se.custom_supplier_code AS "Supplier Code",
    se.custom_suppliers_name AS "Supplier Name",
    sed.item_code AS "Item Code",
    sed.item_name AS "Item Name",
    i.item_group AS "Item Group",
    sed.qty AS "Qty",
    sed.stock_uom AS "UOM",
    sed.basic_rate AS "Basic Rate (as per Stock UOM)",
    sed.amount AS "Amount",
    se.project AS "Project",
    p.project_name AS "Project Name"

FROM
    `tabStock Entry` se
LEFT JOIN
    `tabStock Entry Detail` sed ON sed.parent = se.name
LEFT JOIN
    `tabItem` i ON i.name = sed.item_code
LEFT JOIN
    `tabProject` p ON p.name = se.project
    
WHERE
    se.docstatus = 1
    AND se.stock_entry_type = 'Send to Subcontractor'

    AND (%(project)s IS NULL OR se.project = %(project)s)
    AND (%(supplier)s IS NULL OR se.custom_supplier_code = %(supplier)s)
    AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR se.posting_date >= %(from_date)s)
    AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR se.posting_date <= %(to_date)s)

ORDER BY
    se.posting_date DESC
